title: ancistrum elongatum
intro: Ancistrum elongatum, also known as Elkhorn Coral or Red Coral, is a type of marine coral species that belongs to the family Scleractinia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Africa and Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ancistrum elongatum include reducing inflammation, preventing infections, and promoting wound healing. The coral is often prepared as a powder or extract for use in herbal remedies, and can also be used in traditional teas and infusions.
